subcodes.first_line: Say: I yield Thee thanks, O my God, and my Master, and my Mainstay, for having aided me to recognize the Dawning-Place of Thy signs
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل لک الحمد یا الهی و سیدی و سندی بما ایدتنی علی عرفان مطلع آیاتک
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
